signals.headline: South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's annual inflation rose to 2.2% in March 2026 (from 2.0% prior), missing forecasts of 2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence**[1]

This March figure—latest in search results, reported post-release—shows contained pressures amid Middle East energy shocks, aligning with Bank of Korea's 2.2% yearly outlook (up from 2.1%) while holding rates at 2.5% for a sixth meeting[1]. No newer April data or poli
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?
